basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Insurance Supervisor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Insurance Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 22 May 2026 on the official website of TMC ACTREC. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the TMC ACTREC Insurance Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation may be relaxed on experience basis.

qualification.education_qualification: B.com/M.Com/MBA (Finance)/MHA with minimum 01 Year experience in handling cashless insurance in at least a 100-bedded hospital.
qualification.details: B.com/M.Com/MBA (Finance)/MHA with minimum 01 Year experience in handling cashless insurance in at least a 100-bedded hospital.
